Local File Backup

100% private, offline-first data protection

Download a JSON backup of your recipes and shopping lists. Restore it anytime to recover your data offline.

Reset Database

Danger area • Irreversible actions

Permanently erase all custom recipes and shopping lists from this browser. This action is irreversible.
